session.user: Run the ruff linter and report results: ``` uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/cmux_checkout_workspace.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/cmux/ packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/context.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/testing.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/factories.py src/erk/core/context.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_cmux_checkout_workspace.py 2>&1 ``` Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff linter on the specified files and report the results.
